allies.rationale_text: Probabilistic-thinking gives confidence-calibration the language of ranges and uncertainty so confidence can be expressed as earned odds rather than vibes.
allies.source_quote: Thinking in bets means acknowledging that decisions are inherently probabilistic and based on imperfect beliefs.

allies.rationale_text: Base-rates anchor confidence-calibration to the outside view so conviction is disciplined by what tends to happen in the world.
allies.source_quote: Calibration anchors the inside view (personal perspective) to the outside view (what is generally true in the world).

allies.rationale_text: Decision-trees benefit from confidence-calibration because branch precision is only trustworthy when the branch probabilities have actually been earned.
allies.source_quote: Most useful when a decision tree, integration model, or capital-allocation spreadsheet is carrying more certainty than the evidence base has earned.

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias corrupts confidence-calibration by defending a favored belief instead of updating confidence against disconfirming evidence.
Anchoring can freeze confidence-calibration around an early estimate so later evidence fails to widen or narrow the range appropriately.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Confidence-calibration conflicts with bias-blind-spot when calibration exercises create false assurance that one's judgments are now bias-free.
structured_tensions.source_quote: confidence-calibration conflicts with bias-blind-spot (bias blind spot) when calibration exercises create false assurance that one's judgments are now bias-free.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Confidence-calibration conflicts with authority-bias when well-calibrated confidence in one domain is transferred uncritically to domains where the calibrator lacks expertise.
structured_tensions.source_quote: confidence-calibration conflicts with authority-bias (authority bias) when well-calibrated confidence in one domain is transferred uncritically to domains where the calibrator lacks expertise.

curation_notes.summary: The raw source is strongest on outside-view allies and on anti-overconfidence conflicts rather than on an explicit structured tension block.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor relation inflation where the raw source mainly supports a bounded set of confidence, probability, and anti-bias links.
open_questions: Systems-thinking is source-real as a broad ally, but probabilistic-thinking, base-rates, and decision-trees were the cleaner bounded anchors into the current curated surface.
